metadata.description: Curated sources for production data science: problem framing, leakage prevention, evaluation/uncertainty, reproducibility, and operational handoff.

foundational_papers_and_books.name: The Elements of Statistical Learning
foundational_papers_and_books.relevance: Core reference for statistical learning concepts and evaluation foundations.

foundational_papers_and_books.name: An Introduction to Statistical Learning
foundational_papers_and_books.relevance: Practical ML/statistics reference for model selection, validation, and interpretation.

foundational_papers_and_books.name: Datasheets for Datasets
foundational_papers_and_books.relevance: Dataset documentation framework to support governance, provenance, and risk assessment.

foundational_papers_and_books.name: Model Cards for Model Reporting
foundational_papers_and_books.relevance: Standardized reporting template for model performance, intended use, and limitations.

foundational_papers_and_books.name: Hidden Technical Debt in Machine Learning Systems
foundational_papers_and_books.relevance: Classic paper describing production failure modes and maintenance costs in ML systems.

core_ml_and_data_stack.name: scikit-learn Documentation
core_ml_and_data_stack.relevance: Baseline ML algorithms, preprocessing, model selection, and evaluation tools.

core_ml_and_data_stack.name: pandas Documentation
core_ml_and_data_stack.relevance: Core tabular data manipulation and analysis reference.

core_ml_and_data_stack.name: Polars Documentation
core_ml_and_data_stack.relevance: High-performance DataFrame engine; useful for scalable feature engineering.

core_ml_and_data_stack.name: DuckDB Documentation
core_ml_and_data_stack.relevance: Embedded analytics database for reproducible data work and fast prototyping.

core_ml_and_data_stack.name: PyTorch Documentation
core_ml_and_data_stack.relevance: Deep learning framework reference when neural approaches are required.

core_ml_and_data_stack.name: LightGBM Documentation
core_ml_and_data_stack.relevance: Strong baseline for tabular ML; useful for fast iteration and interpretable feature importance.

core_ml_and_data_stack.name: CatBoost Documentation
core_ml_and_data_stack.relevance: Gradient boosting with native categorical feature handling; strong alternative for categorical-heavy datasets.

data_quality_and_validation.name: Great Expectations Documentation
data_quality_and_validation.relevance: Data validation and expectation suites for preventing silent upstream changes.

data_quality_and_validation.name: Pandera Documentation
data_quality_and_validation.relevance: Schema and statistical validation for DataFrames to reduce data quality regressions.

data_quality_and_validation.name: Evidently AI Documentation
data_quality_and_validation.relevance: ML and LLM observability with 100+ metrics for drift detection (PSI, K-L, Wasserstein), data quality, and model monitoring.

reproducibility_and_mlops_handoff.name: MLflow Documentation
reproducibility_and_mlops_handoff.relevance: Experiment tracking and model registry patterns for reproducible work and promotion workflows.

reproducibility_and_mlops_handoff.name: DVC Documentation
reproducibility_and_mlops_handoff.relevance: Data/version tracking to ensure reproducible experiments and auditability.

reproducibility_and_mlops_handoff.name: lakeFS Documentation
reproducibility_and_mlops_handoff.relevance: Git-like versioning for data lakes; isolated branches for experimentation, reproducibility, and compliance.

reproducibility_and_mlops_handoff.name: Feast Documentation
reproducibility_and_mlops_handoff.relevance: Feature store reference for train/serve parity and feature reuse across teams.

reproducibility_and_mlops_handoff.name: SQLMesh Documentation
reproducibility_and_mlops_handoff.relevance: SQL transformation patterns for staging/intermediate/marts layers with testing and environments.

governance_and_security.name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework 1.0
governance_and_security.relevance: Governance baseline for AI risk management (documentation, accountability, controls).

governance_and_security.name: EU AI Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689)
governance_and_security.relevance: Regulatory baseline for high-risk requirements that often affect DS documentation and monitoring.

governance_and_security.name: NIST Secure Software Development Framework (SSDF)
governance_and_security.relevance: Secure development practices relevant for data pipelines and ML service handoff.
